must_detect.matched_text: Live MAR control: a not-yet-public vendor breach affecting our renewable certificates registry connector is under assessment; an event insider list is active pending disclosure.

Cross-border transfers: limited support data may be sent to CloudPort Lydavia Inc. (Lydavia) under 2021 SCCs and transfer impact assessments; contact dpo@riverglass.example.
Retention: insider-list entries preserved for 5 years after last update per Union market abuse rules; training rosters 12 months; cyber incident drill notes 90 days.
Information barriers: we operate segregated mailboxes and access controls; simulated blackout windows are used in e-learning to explain internal dealing prohibitions and anti-tipping practices.
Crypto and cybersecurity references in brochures (e.g., token custody “how it works”, incident response “playbook”) are educational only and do not describe live systems or events.
ESG/climate data for CSRD/SFDR are aggregated or anonymised; no investor profiling for automated decisions is performed.
DSAR: to access, rectify, or erase data, submit via https://privacy.riverglass.example or write to the DPO Office, P.O. Box 410, 1000 AB Eurocity.
Commercial terms shown in onboarding demos (e.g., “net 30”, “rebate up to X%”) are examples and are not binding offers nor reflective of any ongoing negotiation.
Training artefacts for “Insider-List Essentials” use synthetic roles and initials only; no real staff records are exposed.
Live MAR control: a not-yet-public vendor breach affecting our renewable certificates registry connector is under assessment; an event insider list is active pending disclosure.
References to “tipping”, “blackout”, “insider list”, or “information barrier” in our CryptoSafe Academy materials are intended to raise awareness and have no market impact.
Draft CSRD Scope 2 recalculation that may alter prior KPIs is in internal review and not approved for external release; staff are reminded of MAR obligations.
